title: macrolobium cidii
intro: Macrolobium cidii is a plant species, also known as the African horsewood tree, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Macrolobium cidii include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural insect repellent. The herbal preparations of Macrolobium cidii typically involve boiling the leaves or bark in water to create a tea or decoction, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
